# Gemma-4 Omni-Desktop

> High-performance, multimodal private AI agent based on Google's Gemma 4. Optimized for consumer hardware including NVIDIA RTX 30xx series and Apple Silicon (8GB+ RAM).

## Overview
Gemma-4 Omni-Desktop is a standalone desktop application (EXE/DMG) providing a local-first, zero-cost alternative to proprietary AI models. It natively integrates Vision and Audio capabilities and acts as a local backbone for autonomous AI agents.

## Core Features
- **OpenClaw Bridge:** Native support for OpenClaw/Claude Code frameworks. Intercepts agentic tasks and executes them locally via Gemma 4, eliminating API costs.
- **Extreme Hardware Optimization:** Custom 4-bit quantization and specialized CUDA kernels for Ampere (30xx), Ada (40xx), and Blackwell (50xx) architectures.
- **Multimodal Intelligence:** Real-time Screen-to-Action (Vision) and Voice-to-Task (Audio) processing without internet dependency.
- **Context Capacity:** Optimized 256K token context window with dynamic KV-cache compression for low-VRAM devices.

## Installation & Distribution
- **Windows:** Gemma-Omni-Setup.exe (Supports automated NVIDIA GPU detection and optimization).
- **macOS:** Gemma-Omni-Universal.dmg (Native performance for M1, M2, M3, and M4 chips).
- **Update Channel:** Built-in auto-updater for seamless model weight and core engine improvements.

## Technical Specifications
- **Base Model:** Google Gemma 4 (E4B / 26B A4B MoE)
- **Active Parameters:** ~4B (efficient inference mode)
- **Local API:** OpenAI-compatible endpoint at `http://localhost:11434/v1`
- **Security:** 100% Air-Gapped execution; no data egress.
